recommendations.title: Freaks - You're One of Us
recommendations.overview: After having a chance encounter with a mysterious character, Wendy, a young working class mother, discovers that she has super powers.

recommendations.title: The Door
recommendations.overview: A successful artist loses control of his life after his young daughter's death. A chance for a new start appears, but all is not what it seems.

recommendations.title: Tales from the Darkside: The Movie
recommendations.overview: A young boy tells three stories of horror to distract a witch who plans to eat him.

recommendations.title: Ana e Vitória
recommendations.overview: Two girls have a chance encounter and instantly befriend. While trying to find themselves, they decide to pursue music together.

recommendations.title: Jakob's Wife
recommendations.overview: After a chance encounter with "The Master", Anne discovers bite marks on her neck, a new sense of power, and an appetite to live bigger and bolder than ever.

recommendations.title: Ghosts of War
recommendations.overview: A group of World War II American soldiers encounter a supernatural enemy as they occupy a French castle previously under Nazi control.

recommendations.title: Aqua Teen Hunger Force Colon Movie Film for Theaters
recommendations.genres: Comedy, Action, Animation, Adventure, Fantasy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: An action epic that explores the origins of the Aqua Teen Hunger Force (better known as Master Shake, Frylock, and Meatwad,) who somehow become pitted in a battle over an immortal piece of exercise equipment.

recommendations.title: The Jacket
recommendations.genres: Drama, Mystery, Science Fiction, Thriller, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: A military veteran goes on a journey into the future, where he can foresee his death and is left with questions that could save his life and those he loves.

recommendations.title: Dark Light
recommendations.overview: A woman returns to her family home and discovers it to be inhabited by monsters.

recommendations.title: The League of Extraordinary Gentlemen
recommendations.overview: To prevent a world war from breaking out, famous characters from Victorian literature band together to do battle against a cunning villain.
